ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament series */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series to which the tournament belongs */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the tournament is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tournament */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organizer of the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for player registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for player registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament series */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Main Tournament, Qualifying Round) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of bracket used for the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "entry_fee" INTEGER /* Entry fee required for players */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "min_participants" INTEGER /* Minimum number of participants required */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organizer of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who achieved the result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player in the event */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was achieved */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Associated value (e.g., monetary prize) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the player */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of prize (e.g., monetary, trophy) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Reference to the player's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the captain of the team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the team is based */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Reference to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament series */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the tournament series */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the tournament series */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the tournament series */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved by the player */,
  "average_score" INTEGER /* Average score of the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_sets_won" INTEGER /* Total number of sets won by the player */,
  "total_sets_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of sets lost by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament series */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the tournament series */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the tournament series */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the tournament series */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the team */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved by the team */,
  "average_score" INTEGER /* Average score of the team */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team */,
  "total_sets_won" INTEGER /* Total number of sets won by the team */,
  "total_sets_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of sets lost by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of bracket used for the event */,
  "bracket_data" TEXT /* Data representing the structure of the bracket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bracket */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the bracket */,
  "current_round" INTEGER /* Current round being played */,
  "final_round_date" TEXT /* Date of the final round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brackets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Payment amount */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions_level" TEXT /* Level of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Reference to the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament series */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tournament data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean value indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
